brand_identity.name: The Skill Circuit
brand_identity.theme_strategy: Light Mode Default (Marketing) / Dark Mode Option (Dashboard)

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Weight 800 for Hero, 600 for Section Headers. Letter-spacing: -0.02em.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI text, buttons. High legibility.

mono.usage: Use for code snippets, data values, and 'tech' accents.

primary.usage: Headers, Navigation, Trust Sections, Primary Text

accent.usage: CTAs, Progress Bars, Highlights, Active States

buttons.primary: bg-[#f16a2f] hover:bg-[#d65a25] text-white font-semibold px-8 py-3 rounded-lg shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-[#053d6c] text-[#053d6c] hover:bg-[#f8fafc] font-semibold px-8 py-3 rounded-lg transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-[#053d6c] hover:bg-[#053d6c]/10 font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-lg

cards.marketing: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-xl overflow-hidden
cards.dashboard: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-6

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-[#f16a2f] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#f16a2f]/20 rounded-lg h-12 px-4 transition-all

hero_overlay.usage: Hero section main visual, masked or framed

abstract_bg.usage: Background for 'Why Us' or 'Stats' sections, low opacity overlay

home.hero: Split layout. Left: Bold H1 'Master the Circuit of Success', Subtext, Dual CTAs. Right: 'hero_overlay' image with a floating glassmorphism card showing 'Placement Guaranteed'. Background: Subtle 'abstract_bg' pattern.
home.usps: 3-column grid. Icons in #f16a2f. Cards with hover lift effect.
home.journey: Horizontal scroll or vertical timeline showing Neo -> Sprint -> Pathway -> Launchpad.

courses.layout: Sidebar filters (Topic, Duration) + Main Grid of Course Cards.
courses.tabs: Prominent pill-shaped tabs for the 4 categories (Neo, Sprint, Pathway, Launchpad).
courses.card_style: Image top, Title, Tags (Duration, Level), Price in Accent Color, 'Enroll' button.

dashboard.layout: Sidebar Navigation (Fixed). Top Header (User Profile, Notifs). Main Content Area (Bento Grid).
dashboard.widgets: Progress Circle (SVG), Upcoming Class (Card with 'Join Zoom' button), Recommended Courses.
dashboard.theme: Clean white background, subtle borders. No heavy shadows.

universal_guidelines: Use 'Outfit' font for all headings. Do not use Inter.
Primary CTA buttons must always be #f16a2f (Orange).
Use generous padding (py-20) for marketing sections.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Do not use gradients for text.
